transcript: Cooder, how can I help you?
You the dude makin' all that noise?
I have no idea what you're talking about.
Dr. Spook gave me your number.
Who the hell is Dr. Spook? I don't know a Dr. Spook.
And he told me you were makin' a whole bunch of noise over there. I'm prepared to issue a citation.
You're prepared to issue a citation. Well...
Yes, sir. I've issued a citation to a finger puppet before.
Well... good for you, buddy. All right?
And there's a eight hundred and five dollar fee associated with it.
...you better look real hard at what you're tryin' to do before you go makin' sounds all day and night.
I don't make no sounds all day and night. All right? Listen to me. Lose my number, buddy. You have no idea what you're talking about.
Okay, I don't give a shit what you got. All right?
And I'm gonna give a citation for one hundred and eighty-five dollars.
Really? So you're gonna come by and pick it up?
And if I see one coin, anything...
You're gonna come by and pick up the--
Whoever the fuck you are, dude, stop bugging me.
You're... I won't take coins, I won't take checks.
I'm gonna have this call... I'm gonna have this call traced, and I'm gonna find out where you're at. And I'm gonna call the cops.
I'm gonna... begin doing martial arts.

You... [unclear] ...you don't understand that I used to be a cop, and all my friends are cops, so... do yourself a favor, lose my number, 'cause next time you call me, I'm gonna have it traced, and I'm gonna find out who you are...
I'm going to give you a citation.
Buddy, you are fuckin' full of shit! You understand that? Why don't you come over and try to collect the money?
All right, well, why don't you come over here and try to collect the money?
There's no doubt in my mind, I'll get every nickel.
How does that sound to you?
I don't give a fuck. You understand?
Because I issue citations, is what I do.
You try to collect that money, all right? Try to collect that money.
You say you're gonna collect the money and you're gonna order a citation? Do it, then. Stop calling me and just do it. Put your money where your mouth is and do it, all right?
It's your money on the line.
Hey, buddy. I don't how fuckin' sick you are, or if you haven't taken your medication, but I don't give a fuck. Take your medication.
I don't give a shit what you got, buddy. It don't matter to me.
...and you owe me one hundred and eighty-five frickin' dollars, right now.
Uh, why don't you come and try to collect it?
All right, well, come and collect it.
First of all, I'll get every nickel I have comin'.
And then I'm gonna take you downtown, drop you off someplace.
You're a fuckin'... [laughing] You're a funny guy, man.
You can think about some of this crap you've pulled here.
You're a... you know what I mean? You're a funny guy. Okay? You're a funny guy. Go take your medication, psycho.
